name: SO-TR - Three Sisters (2022) (TR)
plot: Once upon a time in a beautiful yet mysterious country, there lived three sisters named Türkan, Dönüş, and Derya. As a close-knit family, they would dream of a promising future every night. Perhaps such an upbringing, that was similar to a fairy tale on the pine-scented streets of Ayvalık, had not prepared them for the grim reality of adulthood. Over time, the sisters discover that life and the choices that are accompanied by it are not as easy as they seem. Inconceivable secrets can be hidden even by those who are trusted the most and horrific illnesses can lead to the resurrection of the past. This leads them to the question: Is there anything in the world that time cannot heal?
cast: İclal Aydın, Reha Özcan, Almila Ada, Berker Güven, Benian Dönmez, Nazlı Senem Ünal, Hakan Atalay, Vural Şahanoğlu

name: SO-TR - 20 Dakika (2013) (TR)
plot: An innocent pastrycook Melek gets accused of injuring an important politician's son. Her loving husband Ali wants to help his wife to escape from prison.
cast: Tuba Büyüküstün, İlker Aksum, Fırat Çelik, İpek Bilgin, Metin Çekmez, Miray Akay, Müjde Uzman, Murat Prosçiler

name: SO-TR - 2-Qalbi (2019) (TR)
plot: Tells the story of love of a poor orphan man named Maraz Ömer and a poor woman named Ceylan. Two young people who plan marriage plans to work and earn money; Ömer works at the construction site in Kars. Ceylan earns money by cleaning. Ceylan is abused by Taylan, a rich and spoiled young man, and the story begins.
cast: Biran Damla Yılmaz, Aras Aydın, Özgür Çevik, Burcu Tuna, Ezgi Şenler, Nihan Büyükağaç, Simge Selçuk, Tolga Evren

name: SO-TR - QOF NAGA MID AH (2021) (TR)
plot: Adam and Havva have grown up worlds apart. He is the son of an Irish Catholic pastor, she the daughter of a Muslim family that adheres strongly to its traditions. And yet, though their lives seem to be poles apart, fate brings them together, both working as research assistants at a top university.
cast: Özge Yağız, Bora Akkaş, Mustafa Avkıran, Benian Dönmez, Renan Bilek, Derya Alabora, Asuman Dabak, Faruk Akgören

name: SO-TR - Neeftii Nafsadeyda (2018) (TR)
cast: Uğur Yücel, Şükrü Özyıldız, Melisa Şenolsun, Gülçin Santırcıoğlu, Şebnem Hassanisoughi, Zeyno Eracar, Macit Sonkan, Ezgi Şenler

name: SO-TR -CALAFKI XUMAADEY (2017) (TR)
plot: Hazal, beautiful young girl is engajed with Kenan, handsome young fisherman. The day before their wedding, Hazal is forced to marry Vural, successful businessman who fall in love with her since the first time he saw her working on his birthday party as a waitress. Vurals first wife, Naz, was just alike Hazal, and thats the reason why Vural fell in love with her so much, since Naz died 2 years ago and now he finds a replacement of her in Hazal. The story is telling us about the love story between Kenan who thought Hazal dumped him just for money and higher society life and who became a successful businessman with the aim of avenging them , and Hazal who tries to forget all she has been through and the way Vural stole her dreams and youth, and of course Vural who is still waiting for Hazal to love him as much as she loves Kenan.
cast: Tolgahan Sayışman, Hande Erçel, Berk Hakman, Hüseyin Avni Danyal, Yeşim Büber, Melis Sezen, Mehmet Mehmedof, Selin Işık

name: SO-TR - Bada Madow (2018) (TR)
plot: A victim of violence, Nefes fights with Vedat, a psychopath, for her son and herself. In this way, she will experience true love with Tahir, in the Black Sea Region, who will protect her from Vedat.
cast: İrem Helvacıoğlu, Ulaş Tuna Astepe, Öykü Gürman, Sinan Tuzcu, Furkan Aksoy, Cem Kenar, Nalan Kuruçim, Erdal Cindoruk
director: Nehir Erdem, Ayse Ferda Eryilmaz, Erkan Birgören

name: SO-TR - godka (2017) (TR)
plot: When a mafia family named Koçovars are in danger of losing control of their neighborhood, “The Pit,” their youngest son must come back home, a place he could never truly escape.
cast: Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolçak Köstendil, Necip Memili, Kadir Çermik, Perihan Savaş, Mustafa Kirantepe, Rıza Kocaoğlu, Burak Dakak

name: SO-TR - Gabadhii  laciiley (2021) (TR)
cast: Burcu Biricik, Feyyaz Şerifoğlu, Hande Ataizi, Selma Ergeç, Nur Sürer, Tamer Levent, Enis Arıkan, Hamza Yazıcı
